data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: Crucial data points, including model predictions, league standings, H2H, and key sidelined players, are entirely absent. This prevents comprehensive cross-checking of all required sources.

REASON: Incomplete data restricts thorough analysis and confidence assessment. While available data suggests a Home win (xG, PPG, odds), the absence of other critical metrics limits robust validation and risk evaluation.

CONCLUSION: No Bet / Skip

data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY
